NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE:GEORGE CHOPPELAS;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:MAUREEN BRADY 3:06PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF'S COUNSEL GREER M. SMITH PRESENT AND DEFT PRESENT, IN PROPER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT STATED BY PLFF, AS FOLLOWS: PLFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION/RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 684 GURERREO ST, SF, CA; LEASE FORFEITED; WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, STAYED EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT TO NOV. 14, 1995; RENT/DAMAGES WAIVED. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IN PREMISES AFTER NOV. 14TH BE DEEMED PROPERTY OF PLFF AND FORFEITED; DEFT WARRANTS THAT THERE IS NO OTHER PERSON/S IN POSSESSION OF PREMISES; IF DEFT VACATES ON/BEFORE OCT. 31, 1995, PLFF WILL SIGN STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. N0 FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION. DEFT WILL PROVIDE PLFF WITH KEY TO PREMISES -PLFF NOT TO ENTER PREMISES W/O 24 HR NOTICE FOR EMERGENCY OR NEC. REPAIR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANAGNOSTOPOULUS, GEORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 684 GUERRERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-14-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
